data.current_summary: Generate and auto-accept minion key pair
data.description_suggestion: Generates a new minion key pair and automatically accepts it in the Salt master's key management system. This operation creates both public and private keys for minion authentication. Requires authentication. Returns the generated key pair details. This operation modifies the master's key store and enables the minion for immediate communication with the Salt master.
data.reasoning: Description is completely empty, leaving AI agents unable to understand the operation's purpose, inputs, outputs, or side effects. data.current_summary: Stream real-time Salt events via Server-Sent Events
data.description_suggestion: Establishes a Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream to receive real-time Salt events from the event bus. Supports optional filtering by event tag and timeout parameters. This operation creates both public and private keys for minion authentication. Requires authentication. Returns the generated key pair details. This operation modifies the master's key store and enables the minion for immediate communication with the Salt master.
